name: Ananya R.
quote: The projection is unreal for the price point. I get stopped at least twice whenever I wear this. It feels like a fragrance three times its cost.

name: Kabir S.
quote: Sandalwood is my signature note and AEIRA nailed it — creamy, warm, and it lasts all day at the office without being overpowering.

name: Meera T.
quote: The packaging alone feels like a Chanel unboxing. The scent is even better — deep, honeyed amber that stays close all evening.

name: Rohan K.
quote: Clean, cool, and effortlessly classy. My go-to for meetings. Wish the bottle was slightly bigger, but the quality justifies it.

name: Priya N.
quote: Soft, luminous, and so elegant on skin. Compliments every single time I wear it. AEIRA has genuinely impressed me.

name: Arjun V.
quote: This is the most 'expensive-smelling' fragrance I own. The leather and tobacco combination is rich without being heavy.
